meta.snapshotStatus: Official Level 1 + partial Level 2 snapshot wired in
notes: All published app numbers for this pass are stored in git-backed JSON.
The 13T opportunity-cost figure remains an estimated repo artifact, not an official audited series.
Official values are separated from provisional repo estimates in the results bundle.

sources.title: World Bank Open Data API
sources.note: Used for GDP, population, investment, trade, FDI, tax, revenue, oil-rents, and business-density series.

sources.title: World Bank Worldwide Governance Indicators
sources.note: Used for corruption, government effectiveness, regulatory quality, political stability, rule of law, and voice/accountability percentiles.

sources.title: U.S. Energy Information Administration - Iran Country Analysis Brief
sources.note: Used for crude oil production, crude oil exports, and export-destination concentration context.

sources.title: Iran Sanctions | Office of Foreign Assets Control
sources.note: Used for primary-source confirmation that the U.S. Iran sanctions program is active.

sources.title: Repo estimate artifact - cumulative-waste.json
sources.note: Source of the current 13T opportunity-cost estimate.

sources.title: Repo blueprint and ledger artifacts
sources.note: Source of provisional repo-only corruption and budget-drain rows still shown in the app.

processLog.action: Audited the existing Vite app and confirmed numbers were hardcoded in src/App.jsx.
processLog.details: Identified that the app mixed official-looking claims, provisional repo estimates, and scenario outputs in one component without a git-backed JSON data bundle.

processLog.action: Matched the app against the repo's Level 1 and Level 2 data inventory.
processLog.details: Used the project docs to define the target official series: GDP, population, investment, trade, FDI, oil-linked measures, governance proxies, business-density proxy, and sanctions status.

processLog.action: Fetched official World Bank indicator values and metadata.
processLog.details: Collected the latest non-null values from the World Bank API for NY.GDP.MKTP.CD, SP.POP.TOTL, NE.GDI.TOTL.ZS, NE.EXP.GNFS.CD, NE.IMP.GNFS.CD, BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD, NY.GDP.PETR.RT.ZS, GC.TAX.TOTL.GD.ZS, GC.REV.XGRT.GD.ZS, IC.BUS.NDNS.ZS, and WGI percentile indicators.

processLog.action: Fetched primary-source EIA and OFAC context for Level 2 and oil coverage.
processLog.details: Recorded EIA values for crude oil production, crude oil exports, and China concentration, and confirmed the OFAC Iran sanctions page is active.

processLog.action: Calculated context numbers around the repo 13T estimate.
processLog.details: Computed 2024 GDP per capita, trade balance, cumulative official current-dollar GDP for 1979-2024, estimate-to-GDP multiple, and estimate-to-cumulative-GDP ratio.

processLog.action: Preserved provisional repo artifacts but labeled them as provisional.
processLog.details: Kept the annual drain ledger, ideological budget proxy, and corruption cases visible while separating them from official Level 1 and Level 2 results.

processLog.action: Moved the app data layer into git-backed JSON and updated the UI to read from it.
processLog.details: Created this JSON bundle as the canonical app data source for this pass and refactored the app to render results, sources, and details from JSON rather than local JS constants.

processLog.action: Validated the frontend build after refactor.
processLog.details: Ran npm run build successfully after the JSON migration and UI updates.

cumulativeGdpCurrentUsd1979To2024.formula: Sum of World Bank NY.GDP.MKTP.CD annual values, 1979-2024 inclusive

weightedAnnualDrainUsd.formula: Sum((annualBudgetIrr * multiplier) / 650000) for repo provisional drain rows

estimatedOpportunityCost.note: Composite repo estimate built from mixed methods and external studies, not from a single official audited dataset.

costContextCards.label: Official cumulative GDP, 1979-2024
costContextCards.note: World Bank sum of annual current-dollar GDP. Useful context, not a direct validation of the 13T estimate.

costContextCards.label: Official GDP, 2024
costContextCards.note: Latest non-null World Bank GDP series value for Iran.

costContextCards.label: Estimate / 2024 GDP
costContextCards.note: The repo estimate equals about 27.4 years of 2024 GDP at current-dollar scale.

costContextCards.label: Estimate / cumulative GDP
costContextCards.note: The 13T estimate is slightly larger than the sum of official current-dollar GDP from 1979-2024.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: GDP (current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - NY.GDP.MKTP.CD
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Latest non-null World Bank current-dollar GDP value for Iran.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Population, total
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - SP.POP.TOTL
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Latest official population total in the World Bank series.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: GDP per capita (current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - GDP / population
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Derived from same-year World Bank GDP and population series.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Gross capital formation (% of GDP)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - NE.GDI.TOTL.ZS
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Investment proxy used in the project Level 1 checklist.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Exports of goods and services (current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - NE.EXP.GNFS.CD
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Official external-sector baseline for the latest non-null year.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Imports of goods and services (current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - NE.IMP.GNFS.CD
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Official external-sector baseline for the latest non-null year.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Trade balance (goods and services, current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - exports minus imports
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Derived as exports minus imports using same-year World Bank series.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: FDI, net inflows (BoP, current US$)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - BX.KLT.DINV.CD.WD
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Official FDI inflow baseline from the World Bank series.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Oil rents (% of GDP)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - NY.GDP.PETR.RT.ZS
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Oil-rents share is the cleanest official oil-linked macro proxy collected in this pass.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Crude oil production
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: U.S. EIA Iran Country Analysis Brief
officialLevel1Metrics.note: EIA reports Iran produced 2.9 million barrels per day of crude oil in 2023.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Crude oil exports
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: U.S. EIA Iran Country Analysis Brief
officialLevel1Metrics.note: EIA reports average crude oil and condensate exports of about 1.5 million barrels per day in the first eight months of 2024.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Tax revenue (% of GDP)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - GC.TAX.TOTL.GD.ZS
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Official series is materially lagged for Iran, so this stays visible but not headline-worthy.

officialLevel1Metrics.label: Revenue, excluding grants (% of GDP)
officialLevel1Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - GC.REV.XGRT.GD.ZS
officialLevel1Metrics.note: Official series is lagged; kept visible as a data gap rather than treated as current.

level2HighlightCards.title: Control of corruption
level2HighlightCards.description: World Bank percentile rank. Higher percentile is better.

level2HighlightCards.title: Government effectiveness
level2HighlightCards.description: World Bank percentile rank. Higher percentile is better.

level2HighlightCards.title: Regulatory quality
level2HighlightCards.description: World Bank percentile rank. Higher percentile is better.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Control of corruption percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official governance proxy for corruption exposure in Level 2.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Government effectiveness percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official governance proxy for institutional delivery quality.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Regulatory quality percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official proxy for competition conditions and regulatory drag.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Political stability percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official country-risk proxy from the World Bank governance indicators.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Rule of law percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official legal-institution proxy for contract enforcement and predictability.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Voice and accountability percentile rank
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official governance proxy that sits outside fiscal-only metrics but matters for system quality.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: New business density
officialLevel2Metrics.sourceLabel: World Bank Open Data API - IC.BUS.NDNS.ZS
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Official business dynamism proxy: new registrations per 1,000 people ages 15-64.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: Share of crude exports shipped to China
officialLevel2Metrics.sourceLabel: U.S. EIA Iran Country Analysis Brief
officialLevel2Metrics.note: EIA says more than 90% of Iran crude oil and condensate exports went to China in the first eight months of 2024.

officialLevel2Metrics.label: U.S. Iran sanctions program status
officialLevel2Metrics.note: Primary-source status check used as a sanctions-intensity anchor in Level 2.

annualDrainItems.label: Estimated oil discount loss to China

corruptionCases.name: Steel corruption case
corruptionCases.note: Listed as a notable case in the blueprint data.

scenarios.title: Sanctions lift only
scenarios.description: Long-term GDP growth from removing EU/US sanctions.

scenarios.title: Catch-up to Turkey productivity
scenarios.description: Sanctions lift plus productivity catch-up to Turkey levels.

scenarios.title: Catch-up to South Korea productivity
scenarios.description: Sanctions lift plus productivity catch-up to South Korea levels.

baseModelSample.note: Demo-only scenario artifact, useful for wiring the UI to model outputs.

remainingDataGaps: No defensible single official all-in cost total exists, so this pass does not invent a bigger headline than 13T.
World Bank tax and revenue series for Iran are materially lagged, with latest visible values in 2009.
Level 2 is now partly wired, but there is still no clean official monopoly or bonyad-share dataset in the app.
Human capital flight, repression, health, environmental damage, and war losses remain outside one published all-in figure.
